column1: If I had a garden I _____ row tulips in it.
If the weather is fine, we _____ go to the river.
If I were a writer I _____ write detective stories.
If he were not ill he _____ come.
Before you cross the park, you _____ come to a shop.
When you cross the park, you _____ see a school.
If it rains, we _____ not go to the country.
What _____ you be doing when he comes to your place?
If I knew about it, I _____ tell you about it.
If I were you I _____ not accept his offer.
